originalTitle: Cartoonist freed after 15 years in prison without charge in Eritrea
title: Happy News! A Special Artist is Free After Many Years!
content:
Hello, Super Friends of Africa!

Guess what amazing news we have for you today from our big, beautiful continent of Africa! We have some very happy news about a special man named Biniam Solomon. He is finally free! Yay! This is a wonderful thing for him and for everyone who loves drawings and stories.

Who is Biniam Solomon?

Biniam Solomon is what we call a **cartoonist**. A cartoonist is like a magic artist! They draw amazing pictures, sometimes funny, sometimes smart, to tell a story or share an idea. Imagine drawing pictures that make people laugh or think about important things. That’s what Biniam did! He loved to draw clever pictures. These pictures were sometimes **witty**, which means they were very smart and funny. And sometimes his pictures were **critical**. This means they helped people think about things that could be better or different in his country. He used his drawings to share his thoughts with many people.

Where is Eritrea?

Biniam Solomon lives in a country called **Eritrea**. Eritrea is a beautiful country right here in Africa! It is on the eastern side of Africa, next to a big, blue sea called the Red Sea. It has warm sunshine and lovely places. Did you know? Africa is a huge continent with 54 different countries! Eritrea is one of them. People there speak a language called Tigrinya, and also Arabic.

What Happened a Long Time Ago?

Many years ago, Biniam used to draw his wonderful cartoons and share them with everyone. He worked for newspapers. This is called a **free press**. A free press means that people can write and share news, stories, and drawings without anyone stopping them. It's like being able to tell your friends whatever you want, as long as it's kind and true. But then, something sad happened. The free press in Eritrea was **closed**. This means people were not allowed to write or share ideas freely anymore. And because Biniam loved to share his smart drawings, he was taken away from his home. He was not allowed to go home for a very, very long time.

What is a Prison?

When someone is taken away like this, they are sometimes kept in a place called a **prison**. A prison is a place where people stay when they are not free to go home or be with their families. Sometimes people go to prison because they did something wrong, like breaking a rule or hurting someone. But sometimes, like with Biniam, people are kept in prison because of their ideas or what they draw or say, even if they didn't hurt anyone. It’s not a happy place. Did you know? Drawings and stories are very powerful! They can make people happy, make them think, and even make them want to make the world a better place.

How Long Was He Away?

Can you guess how long Biniam Solomon was kept away from his home and his drawing desk? He was away for a super, super long time! He was away for **15 years**! Imagine being 7 years old and then staying away from your family until you were 22 years old. That's a very, very long time to be away from everything you love. Think about all the drawings he might have wanted to draw in those 15 years! Think about all the stories he wanted to tell. It makes us very sad to think about it, but now we have good news!

Biniam is FREED!

After all those years, Biniam Solomon is finally **freed**! This means he is no longer in prison. He is allowed to go home! He can see his family and friends again. He can walk outside, feel the sunshine, and maybe even start drawing his wonderful cartoons again! This is a day for big smiles and cheers! It's a happy moment for Biniam and for everyone who believes in being free to share ideas and stories.

Why is This Good News for Everyone?

This is important because everyone in the world should be free to think, to speak, and to draw what they believe in. When people like Biniam are free, it means that ideas can fly like birds! It means that smart and funny drawings can make us laugh and learn again. Sharing ideas helps us understand each other better and makes our world a more interesting place. When artists like Biniam are free, it helps everyone feel safer to share their own thoughts and dreams.

What Now for Biniam?

Now that Biniam is free, he will have time to rest and be with his family. Maybe he will pick up his pen and paper again. Maybe he will draw new cartoons about all the things he has seen and learned. We hope he does, because his drawings are very special! Did you know? Many artists in Africa tell amazing stories through their art, whether it's drawing, painting, dancing, or singing!

A Message for Our Young Artists!

To all our young artists and storytellers out there in Africa, keep drawing, keep writing, keep singing, and keep sharing your wonderful ideas! Your creativity is a special gift. Being able to share our ideas is very important. Let's celebrate Biniam's freedom and remember the power of a single drawing or a kind word. We are so happy Biniam Solomon is free! Hooray for freedom and for all the amazing artists in Africa and around the world!
summary: Biniam Solomon, a special cartoonist from Eritrea, is finally free after being away from his home for 15 years, which is very happy news for everyone.
whyMatters: This is important because it means a kind artist can now be free, see his family, and maybe draw again, showing that it's good for everyone to be able to share their ideas and stories freely.

content: The suspect had packed some ants in test tubes while others were concealed in tissue paper rolls, prosecutor says.

originalTitle: Iran’s new supreme leader issues first statement
title: A New Voice in Iran!
content:
Hello, super kids! It’s your friend, the Kid-Friendly News Reporter, beaming to you all the way from Africa! I hope you're having a wonderful day, learning new things and playing lots. Today, we have some important news from a country far, far away from our beautiful continent. It's about a new leader and his very first big message!

A New Boss in a Faraway Land!

Guess what, explorers? There's a country called Iran, and they have a new, very important leader! His name is Mojtaba Khamenei. He just got a really big job, like being the head teacher for a whole country. And now, he has said his first important words since starting this new role. It's like when a new principal comes to your school and gives a big speech to all the students for the very first time! Everyone listens carefully to hear what they will say.

Who is Mojtaba Khamenei?

Mojtaba Khamenei is the new "Supreme Leader" of Iran. That sounds like a super important title, right? It truly is! Imagine someone who is like the main guide and leader for an entire nation. They help make very big decisions for the country. They also help guide people with important ideas and beliefs. It's a job that needs a lot of wisdom and care, because their choices affect millions of people. He was chosen to take on this big responsibility not too long ago. Everyone in Iran now looks to him for guidance. **Did you know?** Just like in our families, where parents or guardians guide us, countries have leaders who guide their people!

Where in the World is Iran?

Now, let's zoom out on our pretend map! Where exactly is Iran? Iran is a country that is very far from us here in Africa. If you were to point on a big map, you would find it in a part of the world called Asia. It's a land with a long, long history, much older than many of the buildings you see today! Iran has beautiful mountains, big deserts, and busy cities. People there speak a language called Farsi, and they have their own special foods and traditions. Just like our countries in Africa are unique and special, Iran is too! **Did you know?** Iran is famous for its beautiful hand-made carpets and sweet, crunchy pistachios! Yum!

What Does a Supreme Leader Do?

Being a Supreme Leader is a super important job. It's not like being a class monitor who just makes sure everyone is quiet! A Supreme Leader helps to guide the whole country. They think about what is best for all the people living in Iran. They help to set the big rules and decide how the country should run. They also help to make sure that the country's important ideas and beliefs are followed. It's a very big responsibility, like being the most important elder or chief for a whole nation. They work hard to make sure people are safe, happy, and have what they need. They also make sure the country stays peaceful. **Did you know?** Every country in the world has leaders, big and small, who try their best to help their people live well!

His First Important Words

So, what does it mean that Mojtaba Khamenei "issued his first statement"? It means he spoke publicly for the very first time since he got his new, big job. When someone steps into such an important role, their first words are very special. People listen to hear what their plans are, what their hopes are, and what direction they want to take the country. It’s like when a new captain of a football team talks to the players and fans for the first time – everyone wants to know their strategy for winning! His statement is a message to all the people of Iran and to the world, telling them what he thinks is important. **Did you know?** Many important leaders around the world give speeches when they start their jobs, to share their vision for the future!

Why is This Important for Everyone?

You might think, "Iran is so far away, why should I know about their new leader?" That's a great question, super kids! The world is like one big village, and we are all connected. What happens in one part of the world can sometimes affect other parts, even far away. When a new leader takes charge in a big country like Iran, it can mean new ideas, new ways of doing things, and new relationships with other countries. It helps us understand what might happen next in that part of the world. By staying informed, we learn more about our global neighbours and how we can all live together peacefully. We hope that Mojtaba Khamenei's leadership will bring good things for the people of Iran and for the world. **Did you know?** News helps us understand what is happening all over the world, even in places we haven't visited yet!

Leaders All Around Us!

Think about the leaders in your own life. Who are they? Maybe it's your mom or dad, your grandma or grandpa, your teacher, or your school principal. They are all leaders in their own way! They help guide you, teach you, and make sure things are fair and orderly. Being a leader means listening to people, thinking carefully about problems, and always trying to do what is best for everyone. Mojtaba Khamenei has a very, very big version of this job, leading an entire country of millions of people. It’s a lot of responsibility, but also a chance to do a lot of good. **Did you know?** You can be a leader too, by being kind, helping your friends, and sharing your good ideas!

What Happens Next?

Now that Mojtaba Khamenei has made his first statement, everyone will be watching to see what big steps he takes next. We hope his leadership brings peace, happiness, and good progress for all the people of Iran. It's always exciting to see new leaders begin their important work. We will keep our eyes and ears open here at the Kid-Friendly News Desk in Africa and bring you more updates as they happen! Until next time, stay curious and keep learning, amazing kids!
summary: Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new very important leader, has just spoken for the very first time since taking his big job.
whyMatters: It's important because when a new leader speaks, it helps us understand what new plans and ideas they have for their country, which can affect many people.
